recent_bad_vcs_projects.name: aspose-diagram-python
recent_bad_vcs_projects.summary: Aspose.Diagram for Python via .NET  is a scalable and feature-rich API to process visio files using Python. API offers Visio file creation, manipulation, conversion and rendering. Developers can format pages to the most granular level, create and manipulate shape, render pages, shapes to PDF and images, and much more - all without any dependency on Microsoft Office or Visio application.
